name: monitor-audio-router
description: Chrome extension that routes the active tab audio output based on the focused window monitor.

scripts.test: node tests/rule-engine.test.js && node tests/main-world-sink-gate.test.js && node tests/worker-policy.test.js
scripts.check: node --check content-isolated.js && node --check main-world.js && node --check popup.js && node --check worker.js && node --check shared/rule-engine.js
